name: Factorio
description: Lua mod exports game state to JSON; daemon watches script-output and pushes structured save data
limitations: Requires the Savecraft Export mod installed in Factorio
Modded recipes and items not yet reflected in reference modules — vanilla data only
Space Age content (planets, platforms, quality) tracked in sections but reference modules are base-game only

blueprint_analyzer.name: Blueprint Analyzer
blueprint_analyzer.description: Decode a Factorio blueprint string (version byte + base64 + zlib + JSON), extract the entity list, and evaluate production ratios, belt throughput, module usage, and inserter adequacy against baked-in recipe data.

blueprint_string.description: Factorio blueprint string (starts with '0', base64+zlib encoded)

evolution_tracker.name: Evolution & Threat Tracker
evolution_tracker.description: Analyze biter evolution and defense posture from save data. Returns evolution factor with source breakdown, enemy tier prediction, spawn weight distribution, and defense summary including turret counts, walls, and nearby enemy bases.

defenses.description: Defenses section from save data (injected via save_id). Contains evolution factor, turret counts, walls, enemy bases, and pollution.

module_optimizer.name: Module & Beacon Optimizer
module_optimizer.description: Given a machine type, recipe, and production target, recommend optimal module and beacon configuration. Compares speed, productivity, and efficiency module combinations with beacon count trade-offs.

oil_balancer.name: Oil Processing Balancer
oil_balancer.description: Given target fluid products and rates, compute optimal refinery and cracking plant counts for basic, advanced, or coal liquefaction processing. Returns machine counts, water and crude input rates, and surplus byproducts. Pass save_id to compare against your actual factory and identify bottlenecks.

actual_flow.description: Player's actual fluid production/consumption rates (injected from save data when save_id is present). Contains items, fluids maps.

beacon_count.description: Number of beacons affecting each machine

existing_setup.description: Player's existing machines by recipe (injected from save data when save_id is present). Contains by_recipe, by_type, beacon_count.

modules.description: Module names in each machine slot (e.g. ['productivity-module-3', 'productivity-module-3', 'productivity-module-3'])

targets.description: Map of fluid name to target rate in units per second (e.g. {"petroleum-gas": 100, "lubricant": 10})

power_calculator.name: Power Generation Calculator
power_calculator.description: Given power demand in MW, compute optimal generation setup for steam (boiler/engine ratios), solar (panel/accumulator ratios), or nuclear (reactor neighbor bonuses, heat exchanger and turbine counts, fuel cell consumption).

sources.description: Array of power sources. Each has 'type' ('steam', 'solar', 'nuclear'). Steam: optional 'fuel' (default 'coal'). Nuclear: optional 'layout' (default '2x2'). At most one source may omit 'mw' to fill the remainder.

production_flow.name: Factory Health Diagnosis
production_flow.description: Diagnose factory health by cross-referencing production rates with recipe, machine, and technology data. Computes deficit causes, machine gaps, cascade risks, and tech unlock impacts. Pass save_id to analyze your factory.

completed_research.description: Completed research data from save (injected via save_id). Contains completed tech name list.

existing_machines.description: Existing machine counts by recipe (injected via save_id). Contains by_recipe, by_type maps.

flow_data.description: Production flow data from save (injected via save_id). Contains items/fluids with produced/consumed rates.

quality_calculator.name: Quality Tier Calculator
quality_calculator.description: Compute quality tier probability distributions from module setup, including geometric re-roll chains. Calculate expected materials per legendary output and recycler loop efficiency for Space Age quality mechanics.

ratio_calculator.name: Production Ratio Calculator
ratio_calculator.description: Given a target item and production rate, compute the full dependency tree: machine counts by tier, belt lane requirements, raw material input rates. Accounts for module effects, beacon transmission (distribution_efficiency / sqrt(n)), and productivity bonuses. Pass save_id to compare against your actual factory and identify bottlenecks.

beacon_count.description: Number of beacons affecting each machine

recipe.description: Explicit recipe name for the target item. Required when multiple recipes produce the same item (e.g. 'solid-fuel-from-light-oil'). Use recipe_lookup with product query to find options.

recipe_overrides.description: Map of item → recipe name for intermediate products with multiple recipes (e.g. {"solid-fuel": "solid-fuel-from-light-oil", "copper-plate": "casting-copper"})

target_rate.description: Target production rate in items per minute

recipe_lookup.name: Recipe & Item Lookup
recipe_lookup.description: Look up any item, recipe, entity, or technology by exact name. Supports reverse lookups (what uses X, what produces Y). Returns exact ingredients, products, craft time, machine category, and allowed modules. Prevents hallucination on recipe data.

machine.description: Look up a crafting machine's stats and categories (e.g. 'assembling-machine-3')

name.description: Recipe or item name to look up (e.g. 'electronic-circuit')

product.description: Find all recipes that produce this item (e.g. 'plastic-bar')

tech.description: Look up a technology's prerequisites, costs, and unlocked recipes (e.g. 'advanced-oil-processing')

usage.description: Find all recipes that use this item as an ingredient (e.g. 'copper-cable')

tech_tree_navigator.name: Tech Tree Navigator
tech_tree_navigator.description: Traverse technology prerequisite chains with total science pack costs. Given a target technology and completed research, compute the optimal research path and total cost by pack type.

completed_research.description: Completed research data from save (injected via save_id). Contains completed tech name list.

train_throughput.name: Train Throughput Calculator
train_throughput.description: Compute train network throughput between stations given train composition, fuel type, distance, inserter configuration, and signal spacing. Returns round-trip time breakdown and bottleneck identification.
